_comment: Canonical Conversation document shape. client is the authority — it creates and stores this document in SQLite keyed by web_session_id. g8ee reads it via client context headers (X-G8E-*) to build AI stream context. A field mismatch breaks web session routing, investigation linkage, and sentinel mode propagation.
_consumers: g8ee (Python — reads context from X-G8E-* headers that client builds from this document)
_key: Stored in client SQLite conversations collection, keyed by web_session_id

conversation._description: Active AI chat conversation session. One conversation per browser tab (web_session_id). client creates this when a chat message arrives for an unknown session.

web_session_id.description: Browser session identifier. Primary key. One conversation per web session.

case_id.description: Associated case ID. Set once a case is created for this conversation. Null for pre-case chat.

investigation_id.description: Associated investigation ID. Set once an investigation is opened.

user_id.description: User who owns this conversation. Populated from authenticated web session.

status.description: Conversation lifecycle status. See status.json conversation.status.

sentinel_mode.description: Propagated to all operator commands issued during this conversation. When true, output is Sentinel-scrubbed before storage.
